source: US Census 2020 county codes (national_county2020.txt) + Population Estimates Program POPESTIMATE2020 (co-est2023-alldata.csv). Snapshot committed; build does not hit the Census API. CT county populations (FIPS 09001-09015) patched to 2020 Census county values because the 2023 popest vintage keys CT by new planning regions. County centroids (lat/lon) added from the 2023 Census Gazetteer (INTPTLAT/INTPTLONG).
